Title: Relates to permitting waiver of dental residency requirements for licensure in underserved areas under supervised practice
Summary: Provides that the department of education may waive the residency requirement for a license as a dentist for certain applicants who agree to practice in an underserved area of the state under the supervision of a dentist licensed and practicing in the state.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to permitting waiver of dental residency requirements for licensure in underserved areas under supervised practice
